src/engine/config/tech_config

Technology Configuration Loader

Loads technology research costs and effects from config/tech.toml Allows runtime configuration for all tech trees

Global configuration instanceHelper to reload configuration (for testing)

Types

StartingTechConfig = object
  economic_level*: int
  science_level*: int
  construction_tech*: int
  weapons_tech*: int
  terraforming_tech*: int
  electronic_intelligence*: int
  cloaking_tech*: int
  shield_tech*: int
  counter_intelligence*: int
  fighter_doctrine*: int
  advanced_carrier_ops*: int
Starting tech levels per economy.md:4.0 CRITICAL: ALL tech starts at level 1, not 0! 
TechConfig = object
  starting_tech*: StartingTechConfig
Technology configuration from tech.toml

Vars

globalTechConfig = loadTechConfig("config/tech.toml")

Procs

proc loadTechConfig(configPath: string = "config/tech.toml"): TechConfig {.
    ...raises: [IOError, SerializationError, TomlError],
    tags: [ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Load technology configuration from TOML file Uses toml_serialization for type-safe parsing 
proc reloadTechConfig() {....raises: [IOError, SerializationError, TomlError],
                          tags: [ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect],
                          forbids: [].}
Reload configuration from file
